title: BetterFrames [Fabric]
description: Extremely lightweight and compatible performance pack, you can also join any server with it!
body:
# Welcome to **BetterFrames**!

**This is an extremely light and mostly compatible performance pack.**

## Performance

**BetterFrames** is currently the best baseline of **Performance** mods that you can get right now, whether you just need a simple pack you can customize, or need a foundation for a massive modpack **BetterFrames** is the best

## Why choose **BetterFrames**?

Unlike plenty of the other modpacks this one only has performance mods, no extra gameplay/fluff here, excluding **Iris Shaders**, **Resourcify**, and of course **Mod Menu**, thus making it very easy to use, customize, and add onto.

## Preinstalled shaders

Ive added 2 shaders to the pack, **Complementary Shaders - Reimagined** which is a heavy weight shader which will tank your FPS while making your game look amazing, and **Mellow** which is much more lightweight and tends not to steal all your FPS (i usually have 600-700+ FPS at 20 render distance using it), ive personally tweaked **Mellow** to make it look better then defualt, but thats heavily subjective.

## Specs ## 

I have been testing this pack with these specs

GPU: RX 6600

CPU: Ryzen 5 5600

RAM: 32GB DDR4 2400MHZ

SSD: Samsung SSD 980 PRO 1TB
